claims.summary: Seven consecutive symbols should pass while an otherwise equivalent eight-symbol run should fail.
claims.disposition: Implemented and verified with an exact paired regression test at the existing boundary.

claims.summary: Readable technical expressions containing punctuation and operators should survive the dialogue quality gate.
claims.disposition: Implemented and verified with a technical-expression acceptance regression test.

claims.summary: Artifact removal needs exact boundary, contextual, quoted, and byte accounting.
claims.disposition: Verified in the current single-pass longest-marker scanner and its existing accounting tests.

claims.summary: The quality gate should be retuned beyond the requested edge coverage.
claims.disposition: No threshold retune was needed; any later live provider or fallback change remains a separate Tier 5 prompt/model contract decision.
